## What's Changed in server@1.201.0<!-- RELEASE NOTES START -->

### ⛰️  Features

* Support self-hosted Kura endpoints by [@pepicrft](https://github.com/pepicrft) in [#10965](https://github.com/tuist/tuist/pull/10965)
* Tuist Runners dashboard + billing — runners landing, workflows, jobs, settings hub by [@fortmarek](https://github.com/fortmarek) in [#10848](https://github.com/tuist/tuist/pull/10848)
